comments.body: [NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.

@containers/podman-maintainers @timcoding1988 with Fedora 44 coming out soon, I think we should be looking at enabling F44 jobs and getting rid of F42 jobs on main, and thus allow Go 1.25.0 enforcement. On [debian](https://packages.debian.org/search?keywords=golang), Go 1.25 does seem to be available on debian testing (14).

f42 will get rebased to go 1.25, we already test rawhide so I dont see much value adding f44 which AFAIK is problematic with our automation images as they are no official cloud images until the release

https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/434 might pick up the new go already I hope
anyway there is no rush to get this or other go 1.25 version deps merged so far
